title: @you/fusion
description: Look up the packaged @you/fusion factory: canonical name, a one-sentence description, concrete named-run examples, short operational notes, and a link to the complete parent definition.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: @you/fusion runs a two-stage draft-then-refine flow on one request so the second pass improves the first draft before return.

invocationExamples.title: Invocation examples
invocationExamples.body: Invoke the packaged factory by canonical name with you run --named, using positional or stdin input and optional stage overrides.

operationalNotes.title: Operational notes
operationalNotes.body: Draft and refine run sequentially on the same request. Optional first/second provider, model, and effort flags override each stage independently. Optional --output (or -o) supplies a path for file-oriented markdown callers.

completeDefinition.title: Complete definition
completeDefinition.body: The parent Packaged Factory Reference keeps the complete definition source and published metadata for this package.

deterministicReplay.title: Deterministic replay
deterministicReplay.body: Inspect a full-mode deterministic work-graph replay for the packaged fusion recording: timeline scrubber, topology, and work progress.

links.completeDefinition: Complete @you/fusion definition on Packaged Factory Reference
